title: Sankit GPS & Backend
info: Developing models related to GPS tracking and backend architecture. Designed and implemented the backend infrastructure and developed GPS-related predictive models to optimize tracking and routing.

title: Handwash Action Recognition
info: Built an action recognition model for hand hygiene assessment. Deployed the model for real-time inference and evaluation of surgical handwashing techniques.

title: Multimodal HAR (EEG & EMG-IMU)
info: Proposed a stability-driven feature selection framework to address ambiguity among confusable human activities. Integrated EEG and EMG-IMU signals to improve discriminative representation.

title: ESTE-SIM Interactive Simulator
info: Developing an interactive healthcare simulation system modeling patient physiological responses. Collaborating with Hokkaido University to ensure clinical realism and accuracy.
